creator: jimmiejaz@gmail.com
text:
Possibly related? http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=122830

Error in I830WaitLpRing(), timeout for 2 seconds
(WW) intel(0): PRB0_CTL (0x0001f001) indicates ring buffer enabled
(WW) intel(0): PRB0_HEAD (0x13e1ad64) and PRB0_TAIL (0x0001afa8) 
indicate ring buffer not flushed
(WW) intel(0): Existing errors found in hardware state.
-- 
Over the years I've come to regard you as people I've met.
